languages.text: Ведка Дунавски правила Зарковым в качестве губернатора до глубоких седин и дала начало новой аристократической династии. Кажущаяся наивность не мешала уроженке меровского полка держать новообразовавшуюся знать в железной хватке, а ее способность сплочать людей принесла династии фон Валанциус множество ценных союзов.

Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.
languages.original_text: Ведка Дунавски правила Зарковым в качестве губернатора до глубоких седин и дала начало новой аристократической династии. Кажущаяся наивность не мешала уроженке меровского полка держать новообразовавшуюся знать в железной хватке, а ее способность сплочать людей принесла династии фон Валанциус множество ценных союзов.

Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは老齢までザルコフを統治し、新たな貴族の王朝を築いた。彼女の純粋さに見えた無邪気さは、メローヴ連隊の女性が新興貴族を鉄の力で支配することを妨げなかった。また、人々をまとめる能力は、フォン・ヴァランキウス家のために多くの貴重な同盟を築いた。
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは老齢までザルコフを統治し、新たな貴族の王朝を築いた。彼女の純粋さに見えた無邪気さは、メローヴ連隊の女性が新興貴族を鉄の力で支配することを妨げなかった。また、人々をまとめる能力は、フォン・ヴァランキウス家のために多くの貴重な同盟を築いた。

languages.text: 薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡以总督身份统治扎尔科夫直至晚年，最终建立了一个新的贵族王朝。她外表看似天真，可这丝毫不妨碍这位出身梅罗夫军团的女子用铁腕手段控制新晋贵族，而她凝聚人心的能力也为冯·瓦兰修斯王朝赢得了许多宝贵的盟友。
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡以总督身份统治扎尔科夫直至晚年，最终建立了一个新的贵族王朝。她外表看似天真，可这丝毫不妨碍这位出身梅罗夫军团的女子用铁腕手段控制新晋贵族，而她凝聚人心的能力也为冯·瓦兰修斯王朝赢得了许多宝贵的盟友。

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski resta gouverneure de Zarkov jusqu'à un âge avancé et fonda une dynastie aristocratique. Malgré son apparente naïveté, elle parvint à asseoir fermement son autorité sur les nouveaux nobles et tira profit de sa capacité à rassembler les gens pour nouer de nombreuses alliances utiles à la dynastie von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski resta gouverneure de Zarkov jusqu'à un âge avancé et fonda une dynastie aristocratique. Malgré son apparente naïveté, elle parvint à asseoir fermement son autorité sur les nouveaux nobles et tira profit de sa capacité à rassembler les gens pour nouer de nombreuses alliances utiles à la dynastie von Valancius.

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski gobernó Zarkov hasta la vejez y fundó una nueva dinastía aristocrática. Su aparente ingenuidad no impidió a la mujer del regimiento de Merov controlar con puño de hierro a la nueva nobleza, mientras que su capacidad para unir a las personas aseguró muchas alianzas valiosas para la dinastía von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski gobernó Zarkov hasta la vejez y fundó una nueva dinastía aristocrática. Su aparente ingenuidad no impidió a la mujer del regimiento de Merov controlar con puño de hierro a la nueva nobleza, mientras que su capacidad para unir a las personas aseguró muchas alianzas valiosas para la dinastía von Valancius.

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski, yaşlanıncaya dek Zarkov'u vali olarak yönetti ve yeni bir aristokrat hanedan kurdu. Görünüşteki saflığı, Merov Alayı'ndan gelen bu kadının yeni yükselen soyluları demir bir yumrukla tutmasını engellemedi. İnsanları bir araya getirme yeteneği ise von Valancius hanedanı için pek çok değerli ittifakı güvence altına aldı.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski, yaşlanıncaya dek Zarkov'u vali olarak yönetti ve yeni bir aristokrat hanedan kurdu. Görünüşteki saflığı, Merov Alayı'ndan gelen bu kadının yeni yükselen soyluları demir bir yumrukla tutmasını engellemedi. İnsanları bir araya getirme yeteneği ise von Valancius hanedanı için pek çok değerli ittifakı güvence altına aldı.

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski herrsche als Gouverneurin bis ins hohe Alter über Zarkov und begründete eine neue aristokratische Dynastie. Ihre offenkundige Naivität hielt die Frau aus dem Merov-Regiment nicht davon ab, die aufstrebenden Adeligen mit eiserner Hand zu führen, während sie für die Dynastie derer von Valancius zahlreiche wertvolle Bündnisse schmiedete.

Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.

Ihre offenkundige Naivität hielt die Frau aus dem Merov-Regiment nicht davon ab, die aufstrebenden Adeligen mit eiserner Hand zu führen, während sie für die Dynastie derer von Valancius zahlreiche wertvolle Bündnisse schmiedete.
